title: Sync bundled skill-spec-management data with APM v0.1.6
description:
The bundled copy of the skill-spec-management skill at src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/ is stale relative to the APM-installed v0.1.6 version. Two tasks:

1. Sync src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/: replace spec.py and SKILL.md with the content from .claude/skills/skill-spec-management/. Delete the extra files that should no longer be bundled: .github/ directory, .gitignore, README.md, apm.yml, tests/ directory.

2. Check src/agent_takt/_data/agents_skills/task/spec-management/ — if spec.py or SKILL.md there also differ from .agents/skills/task/spec-management/, update those too.
acceptance_criteria: src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/ contains only spec.py and SKILL.md, both matching .claude/skills/skill-spec-management/
No extra files (.github/, .gitignore, README.md, apm.yml, tests/) remain under src/agent_takt/_data/claude_skills/skill-spec-management/
